'''fadada''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:jibber|jibber]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-d-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jibber|jibber]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| fadada
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:fædædæth|fædædæth]] || [[word:fædædæj|fædædæj]] || [[word:fædædæsh|fædædæsh]] || [[word:fædædæ|fædædæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:fadadadath|fadadadath]] || [[word:fadadadaj|fadadadaj]] || [[word:fadadadash|fadadadash]] || [[word:fadadada|fadadada]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:fadadath|fadadath]] || [[word:fadadaj|fadadaj]] || [[word:fadadash|fadadash]] || [[word:fadada|fadada]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:fadafdath|fadafdath]] || [[word:fadafdaj|fadafdaj]] || [[word:fadafdash|fadafdash]] || [[word:fadafdaf|fadafdaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:fadadatha|fadadatha]] || [[word:fadadaja|fadadaja]] || [[word:fadadasha|fadadasha]] || [[word:fadadaka|fadadaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:fadadath|fadadath]] || [[word:fadadaj|fadadaj]] || [[word:fadadash|fadadash]] || [[word:fadada|fadada]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:fadadathal|fadadathal]] || [[word:fadadajal|fadadajal]] || [[word:fadadashal|fadadashal]] || [[word:fadadakal|fadadakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:fadadathatha|fadadathatha]] || [[word:fadadajaja|fadadajaja]] || [[word:fadadashasha|fadadashasha]] || [[word:fadadaka|fadadaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:fadadathan|fadadathan]] || [[word:fadadajan|fadadajan]] || [[word:fadadashan|fadadashan]] || [[word:fadadakan|fadadakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:fadadathaoro|fadadathaoro]] || [[word:fadadajaoro|fadadajaoro]] || [[word:fadadashaoro|fadadashaoro]] || [[word:fadadakaoro|fadadakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|718161e}}
